visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) Close-up of a young woman with orange hair and a somber expression, wearing a black uniform with white stripes on the collar, set against a dark blue background. (2) A person's silhouette is framed against a bright, low-angle sun over water, creating a strong lens flare and high contrast. (3) Close-up of hands lighting several candles on a cake in a darkened room, with the woman's face partially visible in the background. (4) The woman is seen in a side profile, looking out of a moving vehicle's window at an urban landscape under daylight. (5) In a dimly lit room, a person with long dark hair sits at a desk, leaning forward as if reading or writing. (6) A hand is shown writing characters on a piece of paper, followed by a shot of a letter with an attached photograph of the woman in a school uniform. (7) Silhouette of a person wearing a translucent veil in a bright, ethereal setting. (8) A white paint roller moves across a surface, followed by a close-up of the orange-haired woman looking upwards with an expectant or confused expression. (9) The woman walks through a convenience store aisle lined with bottled drinks, while vertical white text overlays the center of the frame. (10) Close-up of two miniature camera-shaped keychains held in a hand, then a long shot of two figures near a large electrical transmission tower in an open field. (11) POV shot of hands reaching into a refrigerator to grab soda cans, followed by the woman looking back at the camera in a dramatic red-lit environment. (12) Symbolic imagery of dark red lilies dripping with a thick dark liquid, and the woman clutching her head in a dark space as if in distress. (13) An extreme close-up of eyes looking contemplative, then the woman screaming inside a car. (14) The woman is shown curled in a fetal position on a dark floor with purple lighting, then smiling while touching her forehead. (15) Final sequence shows the woman floating in a dark void and standing before a projection of a human face, ending with withered flowers dripping dark liquid.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 怎么就这么轻易. (2) [Subtitle]: 败给了时间. (3) [Subtitle]: 而你眼角盘旋的泪. (4) [Subtitle]: 像是忍默数我的罪. (5) [Subtitle]: 怎么就这么放弃. (6) [Subtitle]: 过往的情节. (7) [Subtitle]: 是我不对. (8) [Subtitle]: 如果能够不让你心碎.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female character throughout; 1 male figure appearing in silhouette/long shots.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with shoulder-length orange/red dyed hair, often seen in a black school-style uniform or casual white tank top.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Varies between domestic interiors, a convenience store with beverage coolers, a car interior, an open field with an electrical pylon, and stylized void-like studio backgrounds.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The track begins with a melodic, clean electric guitar arpeggio featuring light reverb. The atmosphere is melancholic and high-fidelity. (2) A male vocal enters, singing in Mandarin with a breathy, emotional tone. A rhythmic beat with low-frequency bass and crisp snare drums provides a steady pop-rock foundation. (3) The vocal intensity swells as the pitch rises, accompanied by a more aggressive electric guitar texture and increased drum volume, marking a transition to a chorus section. (4) Harmonic tension remains high as the singer delivers long, strained notes conveying emotional pain. The production is dense, with multiple layers of instrumentation including subtle synth pads. (5) The audio reaches its peak emotional arousal before concluding with a gradual fade-out of the guitar melody, ending in studio silence.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Memory -> Emotional Crisis -> Lingering Pain
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To create a visually and aurally evocative music video that explores themes of past love, regret, and emotional turmoil through symbolic and narrative flashbacks.

high_inference.freeDescribe: A highly stylized MV using rapid montage and symbolic imagery (dripping flowers, silhouettes) to synchronize with the emotional peaks of the song.
